/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/benchmark_sw.dir/src/benchmark_sw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/benchmark_sw.dir/src/parse.cpp.o CMakeFiles/benchmark_sw.dir/src/sw/sw_cpu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/benchmark_sw.dir/src/sw/sw_optimised.cu.o CMakeFiles/benchmark_sw.dir/src/nw/nw_cpu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/benchmark_sw.dir/src/nw/nw_optimised.cu.o -o benchmark_sw   -L/usr/local/cuda/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/stubs  -L/usr/local/cuda/targets/x86_64-linux/lib  -lcudadevrt -lcudart_static -lrt -lpthread -ldl
